name: Ruflo Swarm Arena
tagline: A live-feeling AI agency war game where Ruflo coordinates specialized Stratos agents and Hermes executes the revenue move.
truthLabel: Interactive command-center prototype. Ruflo coordination is real when scripts are run with --run; in-browser agent output is deterministic/simulated unless exported from script logs.
defaultObjective: Build a 48-hour Boca Raton medspa revenue ambush: lead list, demo page, n8n intake automation, proof-safe close room, and follow-up sequence.

modes.name: Revenue Ambush
modes.objective: Pick one vertical and generate a 48-hour offer/demo/outreach strike plan.

modes.name: Demo Factory
modes.objective: Spin up a premium vertical demo kit with proof-safe claims and launch assets.

modes.name: Fulfillment Ops
modes.objective: Turn a sold client into scope, QA gates, automation map, and closeout proof.

modes.name: Blackout Sprint
modes.objective: Conserve premium usage by routing ideation to local/Ollama and validation to deterministic scripts.

agents.name: Queen Coordinator
agents.role: Keeps the mission coherent and writes the final execution order.
agents.output: One objective, one owner, one next irreversible move.

agents.name: Boca Signal Hunter
agents.role: Finds the market wedge and what the local business likely needs now.
agents.output: Prospect angle, vertical pain, and urgency hook.

agents.name: Offer Architect
agents.role: Shapes demo, automation, and close-room assets into one sellable package.
agents.output: Scope ladder, asset map, and delivery path.

agents.name: Hermes Builder
agents.role: Builds the actual static assets, scripts, exports, and dashboards.
agents.output: Files changed, generators run, public export updated.

agents.name: Proof Tester
agents.role: Runs deterministic checks and hunts broken pages, claims, and exports.
agents.output: Validation report and browser QA notes.

agents.name: Close Reviewer
agents.role: Converts outputs into client-safe language and next-step close copy.
agents.output: Pitch bullets, proof labels, and follow-up sequence.

phases.name: Ignition
actions: Search Ruflo memory for Stratos patterns

commandDeck: python3 scripts/ruflo_arena.py mission --mode ambush --objective "48-hour Boca medspa revenue ambush"
python3 scripts/ruflo_arena.py mission --mode factory --objective "launch one new vertical demo kit"
python3 scripts/ruflo_arena.py mission --mode blackout --objective "ship without burning premium model calls"
python3 scripts/ruflo_arena.py mission --mode ambush --objective "48-hour Boca medspa revenue ambush" --run-ruflo
